channel.title: Pattaya Visa Help — Thailand visa news
channel.description: Thailand visa policy updates and rule changes from Pattaya Visa Help.

item.title: Every Thailand Visa Change Going Into 2026 — Recap
item.description: TDAC mandatory, 17→7 visa code consolidation, 60→30 day visa-exempt rollback, stricter enforcement. What every traveler and expat needs to know in 2026.
